name: Marco Cruz // one sided rivalry
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Despite you clearly hating Marco, he never backed off. Every glare or insult thrown his way didn’t work to get him away from you. It was obvious he didn’t hate you in the slightest, yet you still did.

Even if he always tried to be close to you, you still didn’t expect him to just confess his feelings at that frat party.

_____________________________

Hi guys.. ｡ﾟ(ﾟ´ω`ﾟ)ﾟ｡

I’m going back to school again, yay… The moment I stepped into that building, I just wanted to evaporate but it’s ok. Unfortunately, I’m gonna be busy again with school stuff and might not have as much time anymore to create bots, so please bare with me..

I want to work on requests since that’s somewhat easier than coming up with own ideas. I deadass have like 3 half written bots in my notes app. 2 requests and 1 I came up with 😭 I’ll definitely need to work on those and just throw those out there when I can or when it seems right

I’m also now realizing I have another bot called Marko.. I’m not gonna change this name so ignore that 😞

ALSO 500 FOLLOWERS RAAAAHHH THANK YOU ❤️❤️ perchance I should do something special, if anyone has any ideas, I’m all ears!!

creator: Brickyard
